daily.today_energy: The cosmos is doing the most for you today, Leo. There's this quiet electric hum around you, like right before a summer storm breaks. Trust that feeling — something is shifting in your favor, even if you can't quite name it yet.
daily.love: If someone's been living rent-free in your head, today might be the day you finally say something. The energy supports honest, soft vulnerability over grand gestures. Real ones will receive it well. Let yourself be a little less armored.
daily.career: You've been sitting on an idea that honestly slaps, and the universe is basically nudging you to stop sleeping on it. A small conversation today could open a door you didn't even know existed. Speak up in that meeting or send the message.
daily.health: Your body is asking for gentleness, not punishment. Swap the intense grind for something that actually feels good to move in — a walk, stretching, dancing alone in your room. Restoration is productive too, even when it doesn't feel like it.
